message:
style(ft-xbnl0.2.4): cargo fmt distributed.rs + metrics.rs (tick 355)

Ran `cargo fmt --check` against the files I've modified this session.
Hit diff on a few rustfmt preferences in the test panic-arm bodies:
- `other => panic!("...")` on a single line rather than split across
  multiple lines
- Method chain fluency preferences on `.await` positioning inside
  multi-line let-bindings

Applied the fmt on:
- crates/frankenterm-core/src/distributed.rs (ticks 311-352 tests)
- crates/frankenterm-core/src/metrics.rs (tick 322 test)

Left alone (pre-existing rustfmt drift from other agents, NOT my
session work):
- crates/frankenterm-core/src/alerts.rs (unrelated)
- crates/frankenterm-core/src/cass.rs (unrelated)

Re-ran the full check script after fmt: all 42 tests still pass
across all 5 filtered cargo runs. No semantic drift from the
reshape.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
